bird.name: Short-tailed pygmy tyrant
bird.summary: The short-tailed pygmy tyrant (Myiornis ecaudatus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found on Tr…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Short-tailed pygmy tyrant
relations.evidence: The species inhabits the interior, edges, and gaps in humid forest and also nearby secondary and transitional forest in the lowlands and Andean foothills
